prompt: Button first-in spot: choose the open default.
why_v1: Button first-in defaults to raise for value and initiative.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Raise is the button open default.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. First in on the button, you want the initiative, so raise is the default open.
recap_v1: Position turns into action here: when the button is first in, the default stays aggressive because acting later gives you the cleaner edge.
